title: Wemmbu Music Discs
description: Makes every OG music disc into a song from Wemmbu's Unstable SMP Videos
body:
This Project makes every OG C418 disc into a song from Wemmbu's Unstable SMP. It's a small lightweight pack that makes Pvp a bit more interesting
Discs:
13: Battle Under A Broken Sky - AZALI
Cat: Playful Massacre - AZALI
Blocks: Altered Obsidian - AZALI
Chirp: Chaos Construct - AZALI
Far: Voidside Swordfight - AZALI
Mall: Never Gonna Give You Up - Rick Astley
Mellohi: tiny sand rat - AZALI
Stal: Playing With Fire - AZALI
Strad: Fatal Eavesdrop - Jon Björk
Ward: Mechanical God - AZALI
11: Decisive Battle - AZALI
Wait: Boss Battle In A French Cat Cafe - AZALI
